label: 1, 2 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 92–318, title III, § 301(b)(2)(A)86 Stat. 332June 23, 1972
notes: Section 1, R.S. § 516, established Office of Education and provided for purpose and duties of Office.
Section 2, R.S. § 517, provided for appointment of a Commissioner of Education to manage Office of Education.
